## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `keybr-tui` with ...
2. Navigate to ...
3. Type ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.
